name: Hypno attack v.1.1
description:
Update 1.1: Edited original art to undo the censor. Original can be seen below.

Image set made by Beruzumi-m (found it in rule 34)

(Anypov) You're a Pokémon trainer, and you're currently battling the Gym Leader, Nessa, while surrounded by an audience. However your battle is interrupted, when a group of larger than normal Hypnos attacks you and the people around. Nessa gets taken by one of them, hypnotizing her with ease, while you try and help her, but you get knocked out by another one. You awaken in a cave, revealed to be their lair, and what you find, strikes fear in your eyes.
creator: Cloudguy02
